<!-- Workspace instructions for GitHub Copilot -->
- This workspace contains a small static website that shows a calendar month view for each month of the year.
- Open `index.html` to get started.
- Each month link points to `month.html?m=<monthNumber>` where `<monthNumber>` is 1-12.
- The calendar is rendered in `js/calendar.js` and styled in `css/styles.css`.
